description: Exhaustive clause-level V2 gold manifest. Existing V1 high-value events are development seeds only and must be relabeled together with assertions and negative clauses before annotation_status becomes complete.
annotation_rules: Human adjudicate every clause, including clauses with no item.
Record events plus state, rule_custom, relationship, belief_report, and description assertions.
Every item needs stable clause_ids and page-level exact evidence.
Heldout pages must not be used for prompt, threshold, schema, or routing changes.
Set annotation_status to complete only after exhaustive adjudication and minimum counts pass.
